toolRequests.name: memory
toolRequests.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/memories/session/loss-root-cause-and-fix.md", "old_str": "", "new_str": "# Loss root cause + measurement harness

## Diagnosis (36h paired round-trips, all already passed per-token bullish gate)
- supertrend 43 trips -330bps 19% win (entry impact 4.9bps, exit 57.1bps)
- momentum 19 trips -193bps 11% win (entry 1.6 / exit 84.1bps)
- mean_reversion 2 trips -157bps 0%
- CONCLUSION: signals non-predictive (tokens bullish at entry still fall ~90%);
  friction structural (entry 2-5bps vs exit 57-84bps -- we ARE exit liquidity;
  ~90bps round-trip + 35bps fee tax).

## Signal architecture truth (TWO layers)
1. SOL session-signal (buildSessionSignalForStrategy on SOL/USD pyth tape) = HARD GATE.
   Active strategy must see SOL bullish or entry blocks (no_strategy_entry_signal)
   BEFORE scouting any token. supertrend monopolized b/c it's the only strategy
   reading SOL bullish ~half the time (direction==='up').
2. Per-token signal (buildRuntimeSignalForMint on each token's Jupiter tape) via
   scoutEntryUniverse -- only buys tokens bullish on their own tape.

## Reframe (do NOT decide A/B until data)
Signal TYPE likely wrong: price-TA noise on 3s tape of pump.fun tokens. By the time
price reads "bullish" the move is over. Predictive dynamic likely FLOW/LIQUIDITY
(buy volume, holder growth, depth), not price shape. Build measurement before design.

## Measurement harness (DONE: built + 25/25 tests pass, NOT yet deployed)
Additive, measurement-only, changes NO trade behavior. In services/worker/src/index.ts:
- import recommendStrategy from './strategies.js' (was dead code; takes ANY tape).
- Harness block after getSharedMarketTapeSummary (~L1900):
  - WORKER_SIGNAL_OBSERVATIONS_ENABLED (default true; env false disables)
  - SIGNAL_OBS_MAX_AGE_MS=1_800_000 (30m force-complete); SAMPLE_THROTTLE_MS=15_000
  - getObservationPriceUsd(mint): SOL price for SOL_MINT else latestJupiterUsdByMint
  - ensureSignalObservationsReady(): lazy CREATE TABLE signal_observations
    (id,session_id,observed_at,mint,symbol,entry_strategy,signal_regime,signal_status,
     momentum_bps,recommended_strategy,recommended_reason,entry_price_usd,
     entry/exit_impact_bps,round_trip_friction_bps,entry_amount_atomic,
     ret_1m/5m/15m_bps,price_1m/5m/15m_usd,sampled_1m/5m/15m_at,complete)
     + partial index ...pending_idx ON (complete,observed_at) WHERE complete=FALSE
  - recordSignalObservation(params): fire-and-forget INSERT; entry_price via
    getObservationPriceUsd (early-return null), runs recommendStrategy on token tape.
  - sampleSignalObservationForwardReturns(): throttled 15s; SELECT <=300 incomplete,
    fill 60/300/900s forward returns w/ current price, complete=TRUE at 15m or age>=30m.
- Hook 1: void sampleSignalObservationForwardReturns() after persistMarketTapeState()
  in runJupiterPricePollTick.
- Hook 2: void recordSignalObservation({...}) right after enter_long tradePlan build.

## Analysis SQL (once data accumulates)
Group by entry_strategy + recommended_strategy; compare ret_1m/5m/15m_bps.
- forward returns POSITIVE but realized PnL negative => friction/exit problem.
- forward returns NEGATIVE => signal selection problem (universe may be untradeable).

## DEPLOY (needs user approval; CLI OAuth EXPIRED -> user must `railway login` first)
railway up --service @roguezero/worker --detach

## Disk gotcha
C: drive hit 0 bytes free -> ENOSPC broke build AND memory writes. Cleared
$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Temp (~550MB) + npm-cache (~554MB) to recover ~1.1GB. Watch for recurrence.

## Live session watched
session_wallet 64zsneT71Rp9CchtvwBBz1p7k13KszSMuBqtkF3U76H2,
owner 5ZCAVMMsC7n7Ldq9drj9wQf63bUi4RWou2Y99VrgDYVF, status active, realized PnL ~-$0.64.
Tiger service_id pu4a5j80ut (mcp_tiger_db_execute_query, no auth)."}

data.reasoningText: The earlier write attempt for the loss-root-cause-and-fix.md file failed due to disk space, so I need to write that content now.
